title: Backend/Data Engineer (Python)
description: Company Canaria is a technology startup providing high-quality, large-scale labor market data to the B2B market. Our mission is to power the next generation of solutions in recruitment, HR analytics, workforce planning, lead generation, healthcare, academic research, and finance by delivering the most comprehensive and accurate job market data available. Our advanced data mining, computing optimizations, and state-of-the-art NLP techniques let us process job market data at scale: over 1 billion unique job postings drawn from 200,000+ data sources, with 100+ fields per record. Our clients use this data to understand market trends, identify skill gaps, and connect people with the right opportunities. What You Will Do Own the design and implementation of robust data pipelines that form the backbone of our product. Design and operate the databases behind that product, across relational and non-relational models. Build and deploy scalable, cloud-native and serverless services on our cloud platform. Use containerization (Docker, and Kubernetes where it fits) to streamline deployment and operations. Ensure system quality through stress, integration, and end-to-end testing. Write clean, maintainable, well-documented code. Collaborate with engineers, data scientists, and product managers. Who You Are (Required) 3+ years building production backend or data-intensive systems. Bachelor's in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience. Highly proficient in Python and comfortable in a Unix environment (scripting and application development). Solid experience with at least one relational database (e.g. PostgreSQL) and at least one NoSQL store (e.g. MongoDB or Redis). Hands-on experience with at least one major cloud platform (AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure). Comfortable containerizing and deploying applications with Docker. Nice to Have Experience designing scalable back-end systems for data-intensive workloads. Kubernetes in production. Aerospike or other high-throughput key-value stores. RESTful API design and optimization. CI/CD pipelines and automated testing frameworks. Monitoring and logging tools (e.g. Prometheus, Grafana). Big data warehouses (BigQuery, Redshift). Asynchronous programming in Python. Web scraping (Scrapy) and browser automation (Playwright). Benefits High-end laptop. Annual performance bonus. Work with global teams (US, EU). Founders and colleagues with FAANG and top-institution backgrounds. Access to powerful on-prem and cloud compute for research. Professional development and growth opportunities. Hiring Process First call about the role & expectations (15 mins) Basic Python coding interview (1 hour) Technical interview (1 hour)

title: Senior Backend Developer (Node.js)
description: Who We Are At Mobiversite, we don’t just build apps — we craft digital experiences used by millions of people worldwide. Our products combine creativity, technology, and data to create scalable, high-impact digital solutions. We’re looking for an experienced Senior Backend Developer (Node.js) who is passionate about building reliable backend systems and scalable services that power high-volume mobile and web applications. What You’ll Do Design, develop, and maintain robust, scalable backend systems using Node.js. Collaborate closely with frontend and mobile teams to integrate user-facing elements with server-side logic. Build, maintain, and optimize RESTful APIs and backend services . Ensure high performance, availability, and scalability of applications. Design and manage database schemas and data models , working with both SQL and NoSQL databases. Monitor, troubleshoot, and debug backend systems to ensure smooth operation. Contribute to architectural decisions and continuously improve backend infrastructure and code quality. What We’re Looking For Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Computer Engineering , or a related field. 5+ years of hands-on experience developing backend systems using Node.js. Strong expertise in Node.js, Express.js , and modern backend frameworks. Solid understanding of REST API design and development . Experience with PostgreSQL, and/or MySQL . Familiarity with cloud infrastructure , preferably AWS . Strong knowledge of JavaScript (ES6+) and asynchronous programming patterns. Understanding of software engineering best practices, including clean code, OOP principles, and design patterns . Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment. What We Offer Competitive Salary: A compensation package that’s aligned with the market and your experience Top-Line Equipment: Latest MacBooks, plus all the accessories and software you need to succeed in your role Private Medical Insurance: We go above and beyond when it comes to your health Celebrations: Special birthday coupons to celebrate you Transportation Allowance: Monthly commute support Meal Allowance: Monthly meal support Monthly Motivation Package: A dedicated budget to keep you inspired and energized Salary Reviews: Twice a year Performance Bonus: Rewarding impact and results

title: Backend Developer - JSON (Remote)
description: Role : Backend Developer - JSON (Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type : Contract Payout : $40 - $42/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Backend Engineer (JSON Schema Developer) to work on a Contract basis. The role involves designing, implementing, and maintaining JSON Schema-based data models and APIs. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure consistency and accuracy in data validation and schema definitions. Key Responsibilities: • Design, develop, and maintain JSON Schema definitions for API contracts and data models. • Validate JSON Schema compliance for incoming and outgoing data across microservices. • Collaborate with frontend and backend teams to integrate schema changes without disrupting existing workflows. • Troubleshoot and resolve schema-related issues in production environments. • Optimize schema performance and ensure alignment with evolving business requirements. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in JSON Schema specification and validation tools like Ajv or JSON Schema Validator. • Experience with RESTful API design and implementation. • Strong knowledge of JavaScript/TypeScript and backend frameworks such as Node.js or Express. • Familiarity with data modeling and database schemas (SQL/NoSQL). • Ability to write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code. • Experience with version control systems like Git. • Understanding of CI/CD pipelines and automated testing frameworks. • Problem-solving skills with a focus on scalability and reliability. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of robust data infrastructure for scalable applications. The position allows for remote work with flexible hours. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Mid-Level Full Stack Developer
description: Çok markalı (multi-brand) yapıda, monorepo mimarisiyle geliştirilen ürün ekibimize Mid-Level Full Stack Developer arıyoruz. Geliştirdiğimiz sistem; web uygulamaları, admin dashboard, mobil uygulama, backend servisler ve yardımcı araçlardan oluşan geniş kapsamlı bir platformdur. Bu rolde hem backend hem de frontend tarafında aktif rol alacak, gerektiğinde mobil ve operasyonel süreçlere destek verecek bir ekip arkadaşı arıyoruz. Modern teknolojilerle çalışan, CI/CD süreçleri oturmuş ve cloud-native mimariye sahip bir projede uçtan uca geliştirme deneyimi kazanma fırsatı sunuyoruz. Sorumluluklar .NET 8 ve ASP.NET Core ile backend API geliştirme ve mevcut servisleri iyileştirme React / Next.js tabanlı web uygulamalarında yeni özellikler geliştirme Admin panel tarafında geliştirme ve bakım süreçlerine katkı sağlama Harici servis entegrasyonlarını geliştirme ve yönetme Worker / background job süreçlerini geliştirme ve operasyonel sorunları çözme Multi-brand yapıdaki konfigürasyon ve deployment süreçlerine katkı sağlama CI/CD pipeline’ları ve production ortamında oluşan problemlerin çözümüne destek olma Gerektiğinde mobil uygulama (React Native / Expo) akışlarına destek verme Aranan Nitelikler C# ve .NET (tercihen .NET 8) ile API geliştirme deneyimi ASP.NET Core ile RESTful servis geliştirme konusunda deneyim Entity Framework Core ve PostgreSQL ile çalışma deneyimi React ve TypeScript ile modern frontend geliştirme tecrübesi Next.js veya benzeri SSR framework’lerinde deneyim REST API tasarımı ve harici servis entegrasyonlarında deneyim Authentication & Authorization (JWT vb.) konularında bilgi Git ile takım içi geliştirme süreçlerine hakimiyet Docker ve temel CI/CD süreçlerine aşinalık Debugging, log analizi ve staging/production ortamlarında destek verebilme Tercih Sebepleri React Native / Expo deneyimi Monorepo veya çok uygulamalı yapılarda çalışma deneyimi Multi-tenant / multi-brand projelerde deneyim Background jobs, queue sistemleri veya scheduled task mantığı bilgisi Puppeteer, PDF üretimi veya internal tooling geliştirme deneyimi Teknolojiler Backend .NET 8, ASP.NET Core Entity Framework Core PostgreSQL Clean Architecture (Api, Application, Domain, Infrastructure) JWT, OAuth2, OpenIddict Serilog Frontend React 18, TypeScript Next.js 14 Chakra UI, MUI Mobil React Native, Expo Zustand, TanStack Query DevOps & Cloud Docker GitHub Actions Google Cloud Platform (Cloud Run, Cloud SQL) Diğer Node.js (PDF servisleri, CLI tooling) Nginx Firebase Cloud Messaging

title: Senior SAP CAP Node.js Developer
description: We are currently seeking a seasoned Senior SAP CAP Node.js Developer to join our dynamic team of professionals. In this role, you will conduct code reviews, develop features, and troubleshoot application issues. You will collaborate with stakeholders, provide architectural input, and drive innovative solutions. Join us to elevate our technological capabilities and streamline development processes. Responsibilities Conduct code reviews and develop features based on best software development practices, ensuring clean code and clean design Monitor applications, troubleshoot issues and resolve bugs Write technical and user documentation Cooperate with the team, track its performance and needs Collaborate with customers and stakeholders on technical topics, provide required metrics to management Participate in the setup, improvement and implementation of development processes Provide design and architectural decisions Requirements 7+ years of proven engineering experience in SAPUI5, BTP, HANA, CAP, Node.JS, CI/CD (Jenkins, Piper, Webdriver.IO) etc. Wide generic technological view is expected. Experience working as team leader focus on cloud, SAP, architecture and mentoring 10+ ppl Proficiency in design principles and competency in microservice architecture Familiarity with Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban, etc.) Basic understanding of JavaScript and Node.js Work experience or theoretical knowledge of SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), HANA database and SAP CAP (Java, Node.js) English proficiency level B2 and higher We offer CONTINUOUS UPSKILLING, LEARNING & DEVELOPMENT Diversity of assignments and projects Personal development plan Mentoring programs and leadership development Certification and professional development support Access to learning platforms including more than 2,500 internal courses and the LinkedIn Learning library with 20,000+ courses English courses taught by certified teachers CORPORATE BENEFITS Extra leave days Referral bonuses COMPENSATION PACKAGE Competitive compensation paid in USD Regular salary and performance reviews MEDICAL & HEALTHCARE Private health insurance WORKING ENVIRONMENT Recreation office zones with tea, coffee and snacks Sports and game consoles IT equipment and Microsoft's Software Assurance Home Use Program (HUP) Please note that our Talent Attraction Team reviews applications and CVs submitted in English. EPAM is a global leader in AI transformation engineering and integrated consulting, serving Forbes Global 2000 companies and ambitious startups. We deliver globally and engage locally, making the future real for clients, partners, and employees. We are proud to be recognised by Forbes, Glassdoor, Newsweek, Time Magazine, Great Place to Work and kununu as a Most Loved Workplace around the world.
